Uses of Class
life.qbic.cli.AbstractCommand

  • Packages that use AbstractCommand 
    Package Description
    life.qbic.cli  

    • Uses of AbstractCommand in life.qbic.cli

      Classes in life.qbic.cli with type parameters of type AbstractCommand 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  QBiCTool<T extends AbstractCommand>
      Tools implementations derive from this base class.
      Methods in life.qbic.cli with type parameters of type AbstractCommand 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      <T extends AbstractCommand>
      void      		 ToolExecutor.invoke(Class<? extends QBiCTool<T>> toolClass, Class<T> commandClass, String[] args)
      Invokes the given QBiCTool.
      static <T extends AbstractCommand>
      T      		 AbstractCommand.parseArguments(Class<T> commandClass, String[] args)
      Utility method to parse the given command-line arguments as a command using the CommandLine.populateCommand(Object, String...) method.
      Methods in life.qbic.cli that return AbstractCommand 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected AbstractCommand ToolExecutor.validateParametersAndParseCommandlineArguments(Class<?> toolClass, Class<? extends AbstractCommand> commandClass, String[] args)
      Validates that the passed parameters are not null and parses the given args as a command of the class commandClass.
      Methods in life.qbic.cli with parameters of type AbstractCommand 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected boolean ToolExecutor.handleCommonParameters(ToolMetadata toolMetadata, AbstractCommand command)
      Handles the standard and --version parameters which all QBiCTool are able to handle.
      Method parameters in life.qbic.cli with type arguments of type AbstractCommand 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected AbstractCommand ToolExecutor.validateParametersAndParseCommandlineArguments(Class<?> toolClass, Class<? extends AbstractCommand> commandClass, String[] args)
      Validates that the passed parameters are not null and parses the given args as a command of the class commandClass.
